subcodes.first_line: Fix thy heart's aim upon the Ultimate Goal, for verily it is the Divine Lote-Tree beyond which there is no passing, that speaketh in the kingdom of creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان اقصد فی قلبک مقصد الأقصی انه لسدرة المنتهی التی تنطق فی ملکوت الانشآء
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @exhortations and counsels, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @wisdom [hikmat], @teaching the Cause; call to teach
